title: Complete Documentation & Cyber Services Page

requirements.text: Create a new DocumentationPage component at frontend/src/pages/DocumentationPage.tsx with complete page structure including hero section, service categories, pricing, forms, and all sections as specified

quotes: Apply for government documents, exam forms, and digital services from home or visit our center for assistance

acceptanceCriteria: Page displays professional hero section with title 'Online Documentation & Cyber Services' and subtitle
Three CTA buttons present: 'Apply Online', 'Visit Our Centre', 'Chat on WhatsApp'
Trust badges displayed: Fast Service, Secure Documents, Trusted Support
All sections render correctly on desktop and mobile

requirements.text: Implement four service category sections with cards and icons: 1) Government Certificate Services (Caste, Income, Residence, Birth, E-Shram, Labour, Ayushman, Ration Card), 2) ID & Personal Document Services (PAN, Aadhaar, Voter ID, Passport, PVC Card with note about biometric requiring centre visit), 3) Job, Exam & Education Services (Government Job Forms, Admit Card, Result, Scholarship, College Admission, Online Counselling), 4) Cyber Cafe & Utility Services (Tickets, Bill Payment, Mobile Recharge, Resume, Applications, Print/Scan/Lamination, Passport Photo)
acceptanceCriteria: Four distinct service category cards displayed with appropriate icons
All services listed under correct categories
Note about Aadhaar biometric requiring centre visit is visible
Cards are responsive and styled with StudyNeeds theme colors

requirements.text: Create Online vs Centre Visit comparison section displaying two columns: 'Services Possible From Home' (PAN Apply, Certificates Apply, Job Forms, Scholarship, Admit Card, Result, Bill Payment, Resume, Ticket Booking) and 'Services Requiring Centre Visit' (Aadhaar Biometric, Photo Capture, Document Scan, PVC Printing, Lamination)
acceptanceCriteria: Comparison table or two-column layout clearly shows online vs centre services
All services listed in correct categories
Section is visually distinct and easy to understand
Responsive layout for mobile devices

requirements.text: Implement pricing section displaying starting service charges: Form Filling (₹50 onwards), Certificates (₹100 onwards), PAN Apply (₹150 onwards), Scholarship Forms (₹100 onwards), Resume (₹99 onwards), Printing (₹5 per page), with note 'Government fees are separate and payable as per official rules'

quotes: Government fees are separate and payable as per official rules

acceptanceCriteria: All pricing items displayed with correct amounts
Government fees disclaimer note is prominently visible
Pricing section uses cards or table format
Mobile responsive layout

requirements.text: Create service request form component with fields: Full Name, Mobile Number, Service Needed (dropdown with all service options), Mode (radio buttons for 'Online Service' or 'Visit Centre'), Upload Documents (file input accepting multiple files), Message (textarea), and Submit Request button
acceptanceCriteria: All form fields present with correct input types
Service dropdown populated with relevant service options
Mode selection allows choosing between online and centre visit
File upload field accepts multiple document uploads
Form validates required fields before submission
Success message displays after submission: 'Our team will contact you shortly'

requirements.text: Add backend data model for DocumentationRequest with fields: id, fullName, mobileNumber, serviceNeeded, mode (online/centre), uploadedDocuments (array of blob data), message, timestamp, status (pending/processing/completed), and implement createDocumentationRequest function in main.mo to store requests with uploaded file blobs
acceptanceCriteria: DocumentationRequest type defined with all required fields
createDocumentationRequest function accepts and stores all form data including file uploads
Files stored as blobs in canister storage
Function returns success/error result
Requests stored in stable variable for persistence

requirements.text: Implement getDocumentationRequests backend function that returns all documentation requests with admin-only access control using existing isAdmin check pattern

quotes: Admin can: View all service requests

acceptanceCriteria: Function returns array of all documentation requests
Access restricted to admin users only
Returns error if non-admin attempts to access
Includes all request fields including uploaded document references

requirements.text: Add updateDocumentationRequestStatus backend function allowing admin to change request status to pending, processing, or completed

quotes: Admin can: Update status (Pending / Processing / Completed)

acceptanceCriteria: Function accepts request ID and new status
Admin-only access control implemented
Updates status of specified request
Returns success/error result

requirements.text: Implement getDocumentationRequestDocuments backend function that returns uploaded file blobs for a specific request, accessible to admin users
acceptanceCriteria: Function accepts request ID and returns associated file blobs
Admin-only access control implemented
Returns array of document blobs with metadata
Handles cases where request has no uploaded documents

requirements.text: Create React Query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for documentation requests: useCreateDocumentationRequest mutation, useGetDocumentationRequests query, useUpdateDocumentationRequestStatus mutation, and useGetDocumentationRequestDocuments query
acceptanceCriteria: All four hooks implemented following existing query hook patterns
Mutation hooks show toast notifications on success/error
Query invalidation configured for mutations
Hooks use useActor to get backend actor instance

requirements.text: Wire service request form to use useCreateDocumentationRequest mutation hook, handling file uploads by converting files to blob format before submission, and displaying success message modal or toast after successful submission

quotes: Our team will contact you shortly

acceptanceCriteria: Form submission triggers mutation with all field data
Files converted to appropriate blob format for backend storage
Loading state shown during submission
Success message 'Our team will contact you shortly' displays after successful submission
Form resets after successful submission
Error messages shown if submission fails

requirements.text: Create DocumentationRequestsManagement admin component at frontend/src/components/admin/DocumentationRequestsManagement.tsx displaying table of all documentation requests with columns: Name, Mobile, Service, Mode, Status, Date, and Actions (View Details, Update Status)

quotes: Admin can: View all service requests

acceptanceCriteria: Component fetches and displays all documentation requests using useGetDocumentationRequests hook
Table shows all specified columns with proper formatting
Search functionality filters requests by name or mobile number
Status filter dropdown allows filtering by pending/processing/completed
Loading and error states handled appropriately

requirements.text: Create DocumentationRequestDetailModal component showing complete request information including personal details, service requested, mode, uploaded documents list with download buttons, message, status, and status update dropdown for admin

quotes: Admin can: View all service requests

acceptanceCriteria: Modal displays all request fields in organized layout
Uploaded documents shown with download functionality using useGetDocumentationRequestDocuments
Status dropdown allows admin to update request status
Status update triggers useUpdateDocumentationRequestStatus mutation
Modal has close button and proper styling

requirements.text: Add Documentation Requests tab to AdminDashboardPage component at frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.tsx, displaying DocumentationRequestsManagement component and adding a summary card showing total documentation requests count
acceptanceCriteria: New tab 'Documentation Requests' added to admin dashboard tabs
Tab displays DocumentationRequestsManagement component
Summary card shows count of total documentation requests
Tab follows existing admin dashboard styling and layout patterns

requirements.text: Add How It Works section with three steps: Step 1 'Submit your request online', Step 2 'Our team verifies documents', Step 3 'Service completed or visit scheduled', displayed with icons and step numbers
acceptanceCriteria: Three-step process displayed in order
Each step has descriptive text matching specifications
Icons or numbers indicate step sequence
Section is visually distinct and easy to understand

requirements.text: Implement Why Choose The Cyber Point section displaying five features: Trusted Local Service, Affordable Charges, Fast Processing, Experienced Operators, Secure Document Handling, each with icons and brief descriptions
acceptanceCriteria: All five features displayed with appropriate icons
Features arranged in grid or card layout
Text content matches specifications exactly
Section styled consistently with StudyNeeds theme

requirements.text: Add Terms & Conditions section displaying all specified terms: service charges non-refundable after submission, government fees separate, approval depends on authority, incorrect information user responsibility, processing time may vary, Aadhaar services require physical presence

quotes: Service charges are non-refundable after submission

acceptanceCriteria: All six terms listed clearly
Terms presented in readable format (bullet points or numbered list)
Section visually separated from other content
Text matches specifications exactly

requirements.text: Add Privacy Policy note section stating 'User documents are kept confidential and used only for service processing'

quotes: User documents are kept confidential and used only for service processing

acceptanceCriteria: Privacy note displayed prominently
Text matches specification exactly
Positioned appropriately near forms or at page bottom

requirements.text: Add Call to Action section with heading 'Need Help?' and three buttons: 'Chat on WhatsApp', 'Call Now', 'Visit Centre', with WhatsApp button opening WhatsApp Web with pre-filled message 'Hello, I want documentation service from StudyNeeds'

quotes: Hello, I want documentation service from StudyNeeds

acceptanceCriteria: Three CTA buttons displayed prominently
WhatsApp button opens WhatsApp Web with pre-filled message
Call Now button triggers tel: link (number to be configured)
Visit Centre button links to contact or location information
Buttons styled consistently with StudyNeeds theme

requirements.text: Add floating WhatsApp button to Documentation page (similar to existing WhatsAppButton component) with auto-message 'Hello, I want documentation service from StudyNeeds' and position it to not overlap with existing site-wide WhatsApp button

quotes: Add floating WhatsApp button on page
Hello, I want documentation service from StudyNeeds

acceptanceCriteria: Floating button visible on Documentation page
Opens WhatsApp with specified pre-filled message
Positioned to avoid overlap with existing WhatsApp button
Button styled consistently with site design

requirements.text: Update ServicesSection component at frontend/src/components/ServicesSection.tsx to change Documentation & Cyber Services card from 'Coming Soon' to active state, adding onClick navigation to the new DocumentationPage and updating visual styling to match active services
acceptanceCriteria: Coming Soon badge removed from Documentation card
Card clickable and navigates to /documentation route
Card styling matches other active service cards
Description text reads 'Apply for government documents, exam forms, and digital services from home or visit our center for assistance' or similar

requirements.text: Add route for DocumentationPage at /documentation in frontend/src/App.tsx router configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Route /documentation configured in router
Route renders DocumentationPage component
Navigation from services section works correctly

requirements.text: Apply StudyNeeds theme styling throughout Documentation page using primary blue (#2563eb), secondary orange (#f97316), and white background, ensuring all components follow modern card design with icons and mobile-responsive layouts

quotes: Modern cards with icons and mobile responsive layout

acceptanceCriteria: Primary blue color used for main CTAs and headers
Secondary orange used for accents and highlights
White background maintained throughout
All sections responsive on mobile devices
Cards have consistent styling with shadows and borders
Icons used appropriately throughout

constraints: Use existing WhatsAppButton component pattern for WhatsApp integrations
Follow existing admin management patterns from TuitionLeadsManagement and TeacherRegistrationsManagement components
Use existing authentication and admin check patterns from AdminRoute component
Store uploaded files as blobs in canister storage following existing blob storage patterns in main.mo
Do not modify existing WhatsAppButton component; create page-specific WhatsApp functionality separately if needed
Maintain consistency with existing StudyNeeds color scheme: primary blue #2563eb and secondary orange #f97316
nonGoals: Implementing actual SMS or email notifications to users or admins
Integrating with external government databases or APIs
Payment gateway integration for service charges
Automated document verification or OCR functionality
